user.title: Christchurch City Council Kerbside
user.description: Enter part of your street address and we will look it up against the council's address service.

reconfigure.title: Change address
reconfigure.description: Enter part of the new street address.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Christchurch City Council service. Try again shortly.
error.address_not_found: No matching address was found. Try a shorter or different part of the address.

abort.already_configured: This address is already set up.
